hypothesis: G10 standard50: a narrowed candidate-ranking selector that directly ranks deterministic candidate labels should improve category-level target selection on gan_s0_g6_standard50_v1 versus G8 without changing scorer, loader, split, bridge, candidate-builder, label construction, or prediction-repair semantics.
metric_caveats: G10 is authorized only as a category-level/candidate-ranking selector comparison before a new aggregation constructor exists.
This run uses gan_s0_g6_standard50_v1 for mechanism comparison; it is not an unbiased validation estimate and cannot replace full synthetic validation.
Gan gold is check__Seizure Frequency Number.seizure_frequency_number[0]; reference[0] is retained only as a difficulty signal.
No scorer, loader, split, benchmark bridge, candidate-builder, label-construction, or prediction-repair behavior is changed.
Run-level metrics use gan2026_paper_reproduction with repair/range/tolerance disabled; post-hoc reporting must also include gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 as diagnostic sensitivity.
Exact normalized-label and monthly-frequency results are diagnostic for aggregation cases unless a separate aggregation constructor is preregistered and validated.
